published_items.title: US government partially lifts Mythos 5 export restrictions
key_facts: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick signed letter finding 'appropriate safeguards are in place' for Mythos 5
Roughly 100 companies and federal agencies cleared for Mythos 5
Approval limited to cyber defenders and critical infrastructure operators
Fable 5 remains suspended as of June 28, 2026
Original launch: June 9, 2026; government suspension directive: June 12, 2026
Anthropic primary statement on suspension at anthropic.com/news/fable-mythos-access (T2, June 12)
Lutnick letter not publicly released — details via CNBC, Bloomberg, NBC News who reviewed/were briefed
Three parallel media investigations: NYT (political targeting), WSJ (researcher briefing government), WIRED (infeasible jailbreak-resistance standard)
Senator Warner claim about Mythos/NSA systems — journalist subsequently advised caution; no NSA corroboration

published_items.title: Codex Remote reaches general availability on all ChatGPT plans
key_facts: GA on all ChatGPT plans (previously Enterprise-only)
iPhone, iPad, and Android apps can supervise, review, and steer desktop Codex sessions
QR-paired device authentication for one-to-one mobile-to-host link
DigitalOcean Droplet Workspace plugin released simultaneously
DigitalOcean plugin provisions a cloud Droplet with SSH, connects as remote workspace
Usage billed under ChatGPT AI Credits (token-based billing as of June 1, 2026)

published_items.title: Anthropic consolidates API rate limits across Claude models
key_facts: Sonnet and Haiku rate limits now match Opus limits at every tier
Three-tier structure: Start, Build, Scale
No existing account downgraded
Organizations maintained existing limits or received higher ones
Prior structure had Opus-only higher limits at upper tiers
Change detected via releasebot.io/updates/anthropic/claude-developer-platform aggregator

published_items.title: OpenAI deploys updated dictation model in ChatGPT
key_facts: New speech-to-text model for dictation across all plans
At least 10% lower word error rate for top languages (OpenAI internal evaluation)
Improved accuracy: Japanese, Korean, Chinese, Urdu, Vietnamese, accented English, long-form Spanish, French, Italian, Portuguese
Better handling: noisy environments, quiet/whispered speech, mixed-language code-switching, letter-number combinations
WER improvement is vendor-measured only; no independent benchmark replication published

published_items.title: Claude Opus 4.7 fast mode deprecated, removal July 24
key_facts: Fast mode for claude-opus-4-7 deprecated June 25, 2026
API removal date: July 24, 2026
After July 24, requests with speed: 'fast' on claude-opus-4-7 return an error
Migration target: claude-opus-4-8 with speed: 'fast'
No capability or pricing changes for Opus 4.8 fast mode noted alongside deprecation
29-day migration window from announcement to removal

limitations: Howard Lutnick's letter to Anthropic dated June 26 was not publicly released; all details from CNBC, Bloomberg, NBC News, Fortune, CNN Business
Fable 5 remains suspended as of June 28 with no published timeline or conditions for restoration
Mythos 5 jailbreak technical claims unverified by independent third-party security firm
Senator Warner NSA claim unverified and subsequently qualified by reporting journalist
axios.com Mythos clearance article returned HTTP 403 from research environment
Anthropic rate limits update sourced through releasebot.io aggregator; no standalone blog post
OpenAI dictation WER improvement is vendor-measured only; no independent replication
Login-walled coverage (X, LinkedIn, Discord) not directly accessed
SEA/Indonesia dedicated searches yielded no publishable in-window items; bulletin is US-heavy
agent-framework, mcp-ecosystem, research-papers: no qualifying releases in June 25-28 window
suggested_next_runs: Fable 5 restoration — watch for Anthropic statement on timeline and conditions
Mythos 5 trusted-partner deployment scope — track which organizations received access
GPT-5.6 broader API availability — OpenAI indicated 'coming weeks' from June 26
Anthropic rate-limit tier documentation — Start/Build/Scale numerical limits update on platform.claude.com

access_errors.resolution: content captured via CNBC, Bloomberg, NBC News corroboration
